name: Iced Mocha Cappuccino
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Hot double espresso or very strong coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the chocolate syrup into the hot coffee until melted.
2. In a blender, combine the coffee with the half-and-half and ice cubes.
3. Blend at high speed for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Serve immediately in a tall, cold glass.
This recipe yields 1 serving.
